indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer and other work materials.

indicators.name: Well-lit environment
indicators.rationale: The presence of multiple light sources ensures good illumination for work tasks.

indicators.name: Minimal distractions
indicators.rationale: The open layout and lack of clutter minimize distractions commonly found in busy environments.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for solo computer work due to its ample workspace, good lighting, and minimal distractions.
